message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
abstract class "Creator" as Creator {
    + factoryMethod()
}

class "ConcreteCreator" as ConcreteCreator {
    + factoryMethod()
}

abstract class "Product" as Product

class "ConcreteProduct" as ConcreteProduct

abstract class "Device" as Device

class "PC" as PC
class "Laptop" as Laptop
class "Phone" as Phone

Creator <|-- ConcreteCreator
Product <|-- ConcreteProduct
Device <|.. PC
Device <|.. Laptop
Device <|.. Phone
ConcreteCreator --> ConcreteProduct

skinparam packageStyle rectangle
@enduml
```
